features: 10X Rectangular Magnifying Glasses Experience exceptional clarity and precision with our 10X magnifier, crafted from high-quality genuine glass lenses that ensure distortion-free viewing and long-lasting durability. The unique rectangular design significantly reduces edge distortion common in round lenses, providing a broader and more accurate viewing area for intricate tasks.

Sturdy 3-Arm Design This magnifying glass features a sturdy three-arm design that illuminates a wider area without shadows or flickering, letting you focus on your work. Unlike unstable base lamps, it clamps securely to your desk for safety and reliability. Easy to use, it’s perfect for crafters and seniors, combining practicality with peace of mind.

Head Touch Control & Adjustable Eye-Care Lighting​​ The large magnifying glasses head touch button enables effortless light adjustment with a single tap, eliminating fiddly controls and avoiding interruptions during detailed work. Featuring 5 color modes and smooth brightness control, the LED lamp provides glare-free, flicker-free illumination. An instant one-touch max brightness button delivers clear light without complex settings.

Secure & Flexible Mounting​​ Crafted with a durable metal clamp (max clamping 2.7in/6.8cm), this magnifying lamp features an extendable arm for versatile positioning. It securely attaches to most desks, workbenches, or table edges—horizontal or vertical—and locks firmly in seconds, ensuring stable, distraction-free work. The 360° swivel joint enables flexible, space-saving lighting adjustment, ideal for hobbyists and professionals.

Practical Gift Choice This magnifying glass with light offers reliable performance for both hobbyists and professionals, perfect for reading, model building, diamond painting, cross-stitch, jewelry DIY, electronics repair, and other detailed tasks. Its thoughtfully designed packaging makes it an ideal gift for friends or family. Combining practicality with attractive design, it’s both functional and thoughtful.
